findingDetails.title: Concurrent refreshes can lose a generation/policy update
findingDetails.description: Concurrent refresh calls can overwrite one another after reading the same generation because refresh uses an unlocked plain overwrite.
findingDetails.claim: Concurrent refresh calls can overwrite one another after reading the same generation because refresh uses an unlocked plain overwrite.

findingDetails.title: Completion status conflicts with required packet gates
findingDetails.description: The packet claims complete while P1 checklist rows and operator sign-off remain open and plan/tasks/decision metadata remain planned.
findingDetails.scopeProof: All seven canonical packet documents were compared; the contradiction spans status metadata, checklist protocol, task completion, and sign-off.
findingDetails.claim: The packet's complete status violates its own P1 completion protocol because required items and sign-off remain open while canonical planning documents still say planned.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: Searched the canonical packet for explicit operator approval or a documented P1 deferral; none was recorded.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: The implementation shipped, but shipped implementation does not itself satisfy the packet's explicit evidence protocol.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: All required metadata, tasks, checklist rows, and sign-off are reconciled or a canonical operator-approved deferral is recorded.

findingDetails.title: SD-015 limitation and follow-up are stale
findingDetails.description: The summary says there is no dedicated SD-015 lock-in test, but the test suite contains a named positive clause test and an adversarial served-route counterexample.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Directly read the named test block and the stale limitation/follow-up entry.
findingDetails.claim: The SD-015 test-gap limitation is stale documentation, not missing test coverage.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: The limitation and follow-up are marked resolved with the dedicated test evidence cited.

noveltyJustification: Traceability review independently confirmed one new P1 lifecycle contradiction and one P2 stale test-gap claim. The SD-015 test gap is disproved by direct test evidence; F001 remains active.
